description: Tracks capability-level requirements per role and the learner current assessed level, used to compute skill gaps and drive course recommendations. One row per learner per capability per learning path.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this skill gap capability record

fields.name: role_id
fields.description: The role this capability requirement belongs to

fields.name: capability_id
fields.description: FK to capabilities_master.id (UUID surrogate key). References the specific named capability.

fields.name: learning_path_id
fields.description: The learning path this gap analysis is tied to

fields.name: current_level
fields.description: Learner current assessed level for this capability on the L0-L4 scale. Sourced from learner_capabilities.current_level.

fields.name: required_level
fields.description: Minimum capability level required by the role. Sourced from role_capability_map.required_level.

fields.name: gap
fields.description: Computed gap = required_level - current_level. Positive value means learner needs improvement.

fields.name: has_gap
fields.description: True if gap > 0, indicating courses need to be recommended for this capability.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: When this gap record was created

constraints.name: chk_current_level_range
constraints.description: current_level must be on the L0-L4 scale.

constraints.name: chk_required_level_range
constraints.description: required_level must be on the L0-L4 scale.

constraints.name: chk_gap_computed
constraints.description: gap must always equal required_level - current_level.

constraints.name: chk_has_gap_consistent
constraints.rule: (gap > 0 AND has_gap = true) OR (gap <= 0 AND has_gap = false)
constraints.description: has_gap must be true when gap > 0 and false otherwise.

unique_constraints.name: uq_sgc_learner_path_capability
unique_constraints.description: One gap record per learner per capability per learning path.

indexes.name: idx_sgc_learner_path_capability
indexes.description: Enforce uniqueness and fast lookup per learner per path per capability

indexes.name: idx_sgc_role_capability
indexes.description: Fetch all capability requirements for a given role

indexes.name: idx_sgc_learner_path
indexes.description: Fetch all capability gaps for a learner under a specific learning path

indexes.name: idx_sgc_has_gap
indexes.description: Quickly retrieve only the capabilities where the learner has a gap (for course recommendation)

indexes.name: idx_sgc_learner_role
indexes.description: Fetch all capability gaps for a learner targeting a specific role

relationships.description: Each gap record belongs to one role
Each gap record references one capability from capabilities_master
Each gap record belongs to one learner
Gap analysis is scoped to a specific learning path

note: This table is the gap engine output. It is populated when a learner selects a target role and their assessment results are compared against role requirements. The recommendation engine then queries this table for rows where has_gap = true to find which courses to recommend.
